description: Reports on a ~2-day cadence (215 rows / 424 days) with ~95% zero-flow reads punctuated by large bursts (up to 504k liters in a single step on 2025-09-06). Counter is strictly monotone; annual total (~1.13M L) reconciles. Signature consistent with a float-valve makeup-water meter on a cooling-tower basin — near-zero baseline flow, occasional basin refills. Winter spikes (2025-01-21 +83k, 2025-02-28 +111k) are slightly atypical for a seasonal cooling tower; worth confirming with site whether these are legitimate winter circulation/flush events or delayed-buffered reports. Daily viz looks spiky by nature of the signal; weekly rolling sum reads better.

Reference formula doc sheet 'KYLTORN V2' exists but has no populated formulas (header only). Current workstream ontology predates the doc and continues to be authoritative. Re-check when the doc is populated.
